task.name: Combat Validation Implementation
task.description: Implement validation layer for combat actions with range checking, cooldown tracking, mana validation, and rate limiting

context.project: muh5 - Mu Đại Thiên Sứ H5 Game

participants.rationale: Complexity 5/10 allows autonomous execution. Existing CombatValidator stub provides clear structure. MovementValidator serves as reference pattern. Requirements are clear and well-defined.
key_recommendations: Fix existing CombatValidator stub to use correct types
Follow MovementValidator pattern for validation structure
Comprehensive tests for all validation scenarios

decision.rationale: Task complexity (5/10) below threshold for mandatory consultation. Clear requirements, existing patterns, and stub code provide sufficient guidance. Developer confident in autonomous execution.

implementation_approach.architecture: Fix existing CombatValidator stub, add missing types
implementation_approach.validation_strategy: Range checking, cooldown tracking, mana validation, rate limiting
implementation_approach.cooldown_tracking: In-memory Map per entity and skill
implementation_approach.rate_limiting: Per-entity action counter with sliding window
implementation_approach.testing: 24 comprehensive tests covering all validation scenarios
